candel
  • Supported models
  • View page source

Supported models

Peculiar-velocity models

These models work in units of \(h^{-1}\,\mathrm{Mpc}\) and can be analysed jointly via JointPVModel with user-specified shared parameters.

  • Tully–Fisher relation (TFRModel): 2MTF, SFI++, CF4-TFR

  • Type Ia supernovae (SNModel): LOSS, Foundation

  • Pantheon+ (PantheonPlusModel): Pantheon+ with full covariance matrix

  • Fundamental Plane (FPModel): 6dFGS-FP, SDSS-FP

\(H_0\) inference

  • Cepheid-calibrated \(H_0\) (CH0Model): 35 Cepheid host galaxies from SH0ES

Package structure

  • candel – cosmography, inference, evidence, utilities

  • candel.model – forward models for each distance indicator

  • candel.pvdata – data loaders for all supported catalogues

  • candel.cosmo – growth rate, PV covariance matrices

  • candel.field – 3D density/velocity field loading and LOS interpolation

  • candel.redshift2real – observed to cosmological redshift mapping

  • candel.mock – synthetic catalogue generation
